face.structure: oval with a defined jawline and high cheekbones

eyes.color: deep espresso brown with subtle golden flecks

face.expression: slight furrowed brows conveying deep concentration

skin.texture: smooth with faint freckles across nose bridge
skin.rendering_notes: slight sheen on forehead and cheekbones to indicate youthfulness

hair.style: long and layered ending just below the shoulders with a side-swept fringe
hair.flow: naturally straight with soft waves at the ends

character.aura: subtle, with hues of blue suggesting introspection and calmness

outfit.base: sleek, fitted blazer paired with a minimalist collared shirt
outfit.design: solid colors with a single subtle pinstripe pattern
outfit.fit: tailored fit, accentuating waist and shoulders

composition.framing: mid-shot, focusing on the upper torso and head
composition.pose: standing with a slight forward lean
composition.gesture: left hand adjusting glasses, right hand resting at side

background.color_palette: cool greys with hints of teal
background.details: blurred digital data screens and faint geometry symbols
background.rules: non-distracting, ensuring focus remains on the character
